house between 45 and 48 and perform marriages etc., at 54. Jupiter in Pisces
indicates visit to holy places, even his birth place. His progeny will be well

CHART 51
If the native be a male, he will be
well educated ,employed in the field of Mars
Jupt
machinery and will occupy high post. Dh.
He may not have a happy married life.
If she be a woman, she will not
be happy with her husband. The part Sun
ner will be entangled in quarrel with
enemies and will experience misery. Sat Ven.
This will come about in his 36-37th Dt. Mer.
-
year. Jupiter's transit over Venus in
debility and later crossing over Saturn
and ketu indicates that she will get some hel? from Government after her
husband's death and also come to possess sor .e landed property. She will also
have one son who will be very helpful to her. She will live upto 66 years of
